recommendations.title: Zombie Apocalypse
recommendations.genres: Action, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Months after a zombie plague has wiped out 90 percent of the American population, a small group of survivors fight their way cross-country to a rumored refuge on the island of Catalina.

recommendations.title: Bullet
recommendations.overview: Danny Trejo plays 'Bullet' a tough cop who takes the law into his own hands when his grandson is kidnapped.

recommendations.title: Shockwave: Countdown to Disaster
recommendations.overview: A stolen seismic weapon is activated in Yemen. A hostage freed there tries in vain to warn against its global effect. It starts seismic activity at the Californian fault line where her daughter and ex are monitoring it. Can they stop it?

recommendations.title: Go Goa Gone
recommendations.overview: A rave party off the coast of Goa goes horrifyingly and hilariously wrong when the island is overrun with zombies.

recommendations.title: Titanic 666
recommendations.overview: After a mammoth cruise ship sails over the site of the Titanic’s disaster, dark and deadly events start to occur on board. As the ship’s captain investigates the tragic occurrences, it becomes clear that the passengers and crew from the original Tita

recommendations.title: Species: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: A scientist, Dr Hollander, takes his niece Miranda to Mexico in an attempt to reverse the effects of the alien DNA he used to create her. However the treatment goes horribly wrong, and sets Miranda on a killing spree as she sets out to find a mate.

recommendations.title: Day of the Dead
recommendations.overview: As the world is overrun by zombies, scientists and military personnel in an underground Florida bunker must decide on how they should deal with the undead.

recommendations.title: Day of the Dead: Bloodline
recommendations.overview: In a world overrun by zombies, military personnel and survivalists live in an underground bunker while they seek a cure.

recommendations.title: 28 Years Later

recommendations.title: Zombieland
